raw.message: Build it your way. Get a free bet. That's Ladisfaction

hook.summary: A skydiver jumps from a plane to illustrate the 'lengths' he goes to for a bet.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a man in a helmet jumping out of a plane door into a freefall over a rural landscape.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Whatever lengths you go to to build your bet builder...

scene_flow: A man jumps out of a plane while talking about the effort he puts into his bet builder.
Mid-air shot of the man checking the Ladbrokes app on his phone while falling.
Transition to a graphic overlay explaining the weekly free bet offer for the Premier League.
Closing brand screen with the 'Ladisfaction' slogan and responsible gambling information.
on_screen_text: YOU BUILD IT. WE GIVE YOU A FREE BET.
cta_text: YOU BUILD IT. WE GIVE YOU A FREE BET.
audience_proxy: Male sports betting enthusiasts aged 18-45 who follow the Premier League.
